hero.sub: Discover outdoor calisthenics rigs, street-workout bars, parkour spots and running tracks near you. Filter by equipment and discipline, see real ratings, and train anywhere, for free.
hero.mapAria: Map of Paris showing outdoor workout spots

features.title: Built for how you actually train
features.sub: From your first pull-up to your hardest set, find the right place to do it, and the people who train there too.

items.title: Spots near you
items.desc: A live map of outdoor training spots, from full calisthenics parks to a single set of bars down the street.

items.title: Filter by sport
items.desc: Calisthenics, street workout, parkour, running and more. See only the spots that fit how you train.

items.title: Know the equipment
items.desc: Pull-up bars, parallel bars, rings, monkey bars, tracks. Every spot lists exactly what's there before you go.

items.title: Real ratings & reviews
items.desc: Honest reviews from the community: surface conditions, crowd levels, shade, lighting and the best hours to come.

items.title: Hours & access
items.desc: See what's open 24/7 and what has set hours, so you never show up to a locked gate again.

items.title: A real community
items.desc: Add the spots you train at, share photos, and help the next athlete find their place to move.

how.title: From the couch to the bar
how.sub: Finding somewhere to train shouldn't be harder than the workout itself.

steps.title: Open the map
steps.desc: See every outdoor training spot around you, instantly. No sign-up needed to start exploring.

steps.title: Filter & choose
steps.desc: Narrow by discipline and equipment, check ratings and hours, and pick the spot that fits your session.

steps.title: Train & contribute
steps.desc: Go move. Then leave a review or add a new spot to put it on the map for everyone else.

spots.title: Spots the community loves
spots.sub: A glimpse of what's on the map right now — tap any spot to see photos, equipment and reviews.

cta.title: Know a spot we're missing?
cta.sub: Drop a pin, add the equipment and a few photos, and put it on the map for athletes everywhere.

items.q: Is Workout Spots free to use?
items.a: Yes. Browsing, searching and rating spots is completely free. We believe outdoor training should be accessible to everyone.

items.q: What kind of spots can I find?
items.a: Outdoor calisthenics rigs, street-workout bars, parkour spots, running tracks, stairs and more, each one tagged with its equipment and the disciplines it suits.

items.q: Can I add a spot that's missing?
items.a: Absolutely. Drop a pin, add photos, tag the equipment and disciplines, and it goes on the map for the whole community to find.
You can explore the map without an account. Sign in with a magic link to rate spots, leave reviews and contribute new locations.

footer.blurb: The map for outdoor training. Find calisthenics, street-workout and parkour spots near you. Free, forever.

meta.title: Workout Spots — Find Outdoor Calisthenics & Street Workout Spots
meta.description: Discover, rate and share outdoor calisthenics, street workout and parkour spots near you. Filter by equipment and discipline, find pull-up bars, parallel bars and tracks, and train anywhere — for free.

meta.title: Privacy Policy — Workout Spots
meta.description: How Workout Spots collects, uses and protects your data.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.lead: This policy explains what we collect, why, and the choices you have. We keep it short and in plain language.

sections.heading: Who we are
body: Workout Spots ("we") runs spots.evnja.gg, a free map of outdoor training spots. You can reach us at hello@evnja.gg.

sections.heading: What we collect
bullets: Account: your email address, used only to send magic sign-in links.
Profile: an optional nickname and avatar you choose, shown on spots and reviews you contribute.
Content: spots, photos, ratings and reviews you submit.
Usage: anonymous analytics (Google Analytics) about how the site is used — only after you accept analytics cookies.
Technical: basic request data such as your browser type, needed to serve the site securely.

sections.heading: How we use it
body: To run the service: authenticate you, attribute your contributions, and show spots on the map. To improve the product using aggregated, anonymous analytics. We do not sell your personal data.

sections.heading: Third parties
body: We rely on a few processors to operate: Supabase (database, authentication and image storage), Mapbox (the interactive map), and Google Analytics (usage statistics, opt-in). Each processes data only to provide their service.

sections.heading: Cookies
body: We use a small number of essential cookies to keep you signed in and remember your preferences (theme, language). Analytics cookies are optional and only set if you accept them in the banner.

sections.heading: Your rights
body: You can view and edit your profile at any time, and request deletion of your account and contributions by emailing hello@evnja.gg. Depending on where you live, you may have additional rights under laws such as the GDPR.

sections.heading: Data retention
body: We keep your data while your account is active. When you ask us to delete it, we remove your personal data and anonymise contributions that remain useful to the community.

meta.title: Terms of Service — Workout Spots
meta.description: The terms for using Workout Spots.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.lead: By using Workout Spots you agree to these terms. They're written to keep the community useful and safe.

sections.heading: Using the service
body: Workout Spots is provided free of charge for personal, non-commercial use. You must be old enough to consent to these terms in your country.

sections.heading: Your contributions
body: You're responsible for the spots, photos, ratings and reviews you add. Only submit content you have the right to share, and keep it accurate and respectful. By contributing, you grant us a licence to display and distribute that content within the service.

sections.heading: Acceptable use
bullets: Don't post false, misleading or unsafe spot information.
Don't upload content you don't own or that infringes others' rights.
Don't harass other users or post offensive content.
Don't attempt to disrupt, scrape or abuse the service.

sections.heading: Moderation
body: We may edit, hide or remove content and suspend accounts that break these terms, to protect the community. You can report problematic spots or reviews from within the app.

sections.heading: Safety disclaimer
body: Outdoor training carries risk. Spot information is community-sourced and may be inaccurate or out of date. Always assess equipment and surroundings yourself before training — you train at your own risk.

sections.heading: No warranty
body: The service is provided "as is", without warranties of any kind. We don't guarantee it will always be available, accurate or error-free.

sections.heading: Changes
body: We may update these terms as the product evolves. We'll update the date above when we do; continued use means you accept the changes.

meta.title: About — Workout Spots
meta.description: Why we built Workout Spots — the map for outdoor training.

about.title: About Workout Spots
about.lead: We're building the map we always wanted as athletes: every outdoor training spot, in one place, free for everyone.

sections.heading: Our mission
body: Outdoor training should be accessible to everyone. A pull-up bar in a park, a set of rings in the woods, a track open at dawn — these are free gyms, if only you know where they are. Workout Spots puts them all on one map.

sections.heading: Built by the community
body: Every spot, photo and review comes from athletes like you. The more people contribute, the better the map gets for the next person looking for somewhere to train.

sections.heading: Free, as long as it's possible
body: Browsing, searching and rating spots is completely free, with no ads getting in your way. We'd rather grow a community than sell your attention.

sections.heading: What's next
body: We're starting with spots. Clubs and events will come later.

meta.title: Contact — Workout Spots
meta.description: Get in touch with the Workout Spots team.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.lead: Questions, feedback, a bug, or a partnership idea? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.emailBody: The fastest way to reach the team. We usually reply within a couple of days.
contact.socialBody: Find us on social media for new spots and updates.
